result.stdout:
Description:
  Unreal Engine Command Line Interface

Usage:
  UEScript.CLI [command] [options] [[--] <additional arguments>...]]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  build <file>   Build unreal engine project
  engine <file>  Manage installed engines

Additional Arguments:
  Arguments passed to the application that is being run.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Build unreal engine project

Usage:
  UEScript.CLI build <file> [options] [[--] <additional arguments>...]]

Arguments:
  <file>  File to build

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Additional Arguments:
  Arguments passed to the application that is being run.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Manage installed engines

Usage:
  UEScript.CLI engine <file> [command] [options] [[--] <additional arguments>...]]

Arguments:
  <file>  Path to uproject file

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  list                         List installed Unreal Engine versions
  add <name> <path>            Add unreal engine install
  delete <index>               Delete unreal engine install
  install <name> <path> <url>  Install Unreal ENGINE from url

Additional Arguments:
  Arguments passed to the application that is being run.

commands.payload:
Description:

Usage:
  UEScript.CLI engine <file> [command] [options] [[--] <additional arguments>...]]

Arguments:

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  list                         List installed Unreal Engine versions
  add <name> <path>            Add unreal engine install
  delete <index>               Delete unreal engine install
  install <name> <path> <url>  Install Unreal ENGINE from url

Additional Arguments:
  Arguments passed to the application that is being run.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Add unreal engine install

Usage:
  UEScript.CLI engine <file> add <name> <path> [options] [[--] <additional arguments>...]]

Arguments:
  <file>  Path to uproject file
  <name>  Name of the engine
  <path>  Path to the engine

Options:
  -d, --isDefault  Set this engine as default
  -?, -h, --help   Show help and usage information

Additional Arguments:
  Arguments passed to the application that is being run.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Install Unreal ENGINE from url

Usage:
  UEScript.CLI engine <file> install <name> <path> <url> [options] [[--] <additional arguments>...]]

Arguments:
  <file>  Path to uproject file
  <name>  Name of the engine
  <path>  Path to the engine
  <url>   Url to the engine

Options:
  -d, --isDefault  Set this engine as default
  -?, -h, --help   Show help and usage information

Additional Arguments:
  Arguments passed to the application that is being run.
